name: Connection Premade Module
author: Shockless
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Connection module.

surfaces.label: Connection Panel
surfaces.summary: Session, profile, and lifecycle controls in the dock.

surfaces.label: Connection Status
surfaces.summary: Connection state shown in the bottom strip.

surfaces.label: Connection Lifecycle Commands
surfaces.summary: Launch and stop controls once embed plumbing is available.

commands.name: shell.togglePluginDock
commands.label: Toggle Plugin Dock
commands.description: Collapse or expand the Shockless plugin dock without touching game input.

commands.name: engine.launchEmbedded
commands.label: Launch Embedded Shockless
commands.description: Attach the selected ready Shockless client profile inside the Shockless GameHost.

commands.name: engine.consoleStart
commands.label: Console Start Client
commands.description: Start the selected or targeted client through the backtick console command bus.

commands.name: client.importReference
commands.label: Import Or Build Client Profile
commands.description: Register an existing Shockless profile folder, or build a playable profile from a compiled client folder when no matching cache exists.
